headline: Jim Cramer Recommends Toll Over PulteGroup Among Home Builders
summary: PulteGroup, Inc. (NYSE:PHM) was among the stocks Jim Cramer discussed on Mad Money, highlighting several companies with market caps over a trillion dollars. Toward the end of the lightning round, when a caller inquired about the stock, Cramer commented: Okay, look, I like Toll because they have so many cash buyers. They have more than […]
